listitem.para: scalars/vectors/matices of positives integers, x and y must have the same size

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Given x,y two positives integers this function returns the decimal number whose the binary form is the OR of the binary representations of x and y. If dimension of x is superior than 1 then z(i) is equal to bitor(x(i),y(i)).

refsection.title: Examples
